title: DSK Legal opens Chennai Office with 25-member team
description: DSK Legal has expanded its presence in South India with the lateral hire of three partners, Sameena Chatrapathy, Kavita Pancholi and Anu D’rose Prabhu along with their team of 22 professionals, all joining from Chugh Universal Legal, to set up the firm’s Chennai office.The three incoming partners bring complementary practices across corporate, private equity and real estate. The 25-person group comprises a 14-member corporate team and an 8-member real estate team, giving DSK Legal an immediate f
